arts.ttl: Vivianne Miedema Admits Arsenal Exit Was Difficult, Grateful for Man City Move

arts.ttl: Arsenal have ‘set their sights’ on 20-year-old – Gunners official sent at weekend

That has not stopped the Gunners from looking around at future targets and one name that has impressed them is Como’s Nico Paz.
